name: Chocolate Pudding Pie Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 350°F.
2. Combine cream and milk in a pot. Place over medium heat and bring to a boil.
3. Remove from the heat and whisk in the chocolates until dissolved.
4. Add the currants. Set aside.
5. Whisk together sugar, egg yolks, vanilla, and salt in a mixing bowl.
6. Pour the cream mixture over, stirring.
7. Pour the mixture into a baking dish. Cover with foil.
8. Place in a water bath and place in oven for 45 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and remove the pudding from the water bath. Let cool.
10. Refrigerate until well chilled.
11. When ready to serve, transfer to pre-baked pie shell.
